revision.comment: Trying to figure out what's going on in this template https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Template:%E7%9A%87%E5%AE%A4%E7%A5%9E%E4%B8%96%E4%B8%83%E4%BB%A3
Immanuelle moved page [[User:Immanuelle/Seven Generations of the Royal Family]] to [[Draft:Seven Generations of the Royal Family]]
Immanuelle moved page [[Draft:Seven Generations of the Royal Family]] to [[Template:Seven Generations of Kami]]
Immanuelle moved page [[Template:Seven Generations of Kami]] to [[Template:Kamiyonanayo]]
Text replacement - "豊雲野神}}" to "豊雲野神|1=Toyokumono-no-Mikoto}}"
Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23508203007|commit triggered pipeline]]
